variants: Arun Bansal is an accomplished professional in the field of emergency medicine, earning the prestigious Frostcliff Tribute for his exceptional contributions. He currently resides in Chicory Mews, where he combines his passion for medicine with his interests in other disciplines. One of his notable creations is the book Petal Flux Oscillator, which provides innovative insights into technology. In addition to his medical expertise, Arun is an active member of the Redshift Astronomers Assembly, engaged in discussions about the night sky. His varied interests illustrate a commitment to both health care and the broader scientific community.
